mapper.select: select id, title, content, target_money as targetMoney, now_money as nowMoney, donor_count as donorCount, image, status, create_time, update_time from community_donation where status = 0 order by id desc
mapper.update: UPDATE community_donation SET now_money = now_money + #{amount}, donor_count = donor_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
